prevalence.trend: increasing due to dietary changes, obesity

riskFactors: High sodium and animal protein diet
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: EAU guidelines, non-contrast CT gold standard

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: EAU guidelines, low-dose CT protocol widely adopted
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Conservative: medical expulsive therapy (alpha-blockers); Surgical: ESWL, flexible ureteroscopy, PCNL; Metabolic evaluation for recurrent stones
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Rising prevalence in Southern EU, obesity epidemic, high recurrence rates, healthcare costs
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: EAU comprehensive guidelines, high lithotripsy access, metabolic stone clinics, preventive counseling programs
